tags.addr:city: DR Talaoul Imlil, Asni, Marrakech tansift
tags.description:
Berber guesthouse/hotel/lodge/riad. Also a Restaurant, yoga studio and hammam is located here. 
Terrace with great view over the Imlil Valley and the top of Toubkal (4167 m), the highest mountain in North Africa and the Arabic world. www.facebook.com/riad
tags.name: Riad Atlas 4 Seasons / Talaoul Mountain Lodge / Restaurant Talaoul
